sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39293" key="e)pidorpi/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδορπ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n39293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat in the second course</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for dessert</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0502.tlg001:4:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.5</biblScope> </bibl>: in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.102</biblScope> </bibl> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιδορπήσασθαι</foreign> is <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ίσασθαι</ref></xr>, cf. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
